examples: Here's a complimentary drink on the house.
She was very complimentary about your work.
context: We got really lucky. This restaurant is beautiful, and there was no wait list. They gave us complimentary bread and oil, which is great because I am hungry. We've got a large menu here, and a large wine list. Very tempting. I'm not sure if I'm craving anything specific. I think I just have to browse the menu and see what sounds good. Do you recommend? Yes, so on the appetizer side, I would recommend onion soup. Onion soup, okay. Or if you would like a salad, it's really popular as the best of shrimp one. Oh, okay. On this side, I would recommend beef bburingion, okay. And lasagna, it's really popular. If you would like pasta, so I would recommend you garlic pasta. Okay, thank you so much. No problem. Yes, I think we'll have the grilled salmon.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.

context: I can tell they cooked this really well. They definitely know what they're doing in the kitchen here.

examples: She embraced the opportunity to study abroad.

context: Thank you. You can never go wrong with bread. I like to dip it in the oil in vinegar. I do not fear carbs. I embrace fun. examples: The cake has a soft, fluffy texture.
I love the crunchy texture of fried chicken.

context: Mmm, good. The carrot's very soft and texture is easy to chew and the taste is kind of what I imagine the beef taste like. It tastes very meaty, even though it's a carrot. Wow, very tender. It was so easy to bite into. I can see this being comfort food for many people. Thank you.
